greetings.hello: Hey there! How can I assist you today? 😊
greetings.hi: Hi! How can I help you? 😊
greetings.hey: Hey! What can I do for you today? 😊

math.addition: Addition is combining two numbers to get a sum. Example: 2 + 3 = 5. Enter two numbers to add (e.g., 'add 4 5').
math.subtraction: Subtraction finds the difference between two numbers. Example: 5 - 2 = 3. Enter two numbers to subtract (e.g., 'subtract 8 3').
math.multiplication: Multiplication is repeated addition. Example: 3 × 4 = 12. Enter two numbers to multiply (e.g., 'multiply 6 7').
math.division: Division splits a number into equal parts. Example: 8 ÷ 2 = 4. Enter two numbers to divide (e.g., 'divide 10 2').

physics.force: Force is calculated as mass × acceleration (F = m × a). Enter mass and acceleration (e.g., 'force 10 2').
physics.speed: Speed is calculated as distance ÷ time (S = d / t). Enter distance and time (e.g., 'speed 100 2').
physics.density: Density is mass ÷ volume (D = m / V). Enter mass and volume (e.g., 'density 50 10').
physics.work: Work is force × displacement (W = F × d). Enter force and displacement (e.g., 'work 15 3').
